field_values.action_summary: Dorothy clicks her heels three times and commands herself home. She is instantly transported to the Kansas prairie. In the transition, the Silver Shoes are lost in the desert. Dorothy arrives safely at her farmhouse to find Uncle Henry and Toto.
field_values.emotional_beat: Magical Chaos $\rightarrow$ Sudden Arrival $\rightarrow$ Grounded Relief/Melancholy (loss of shoes).
field_values.camera_intent: Fast-paced/blurred POV or montage for flight through space; Wide establishing shot of the Kansas landscape; Medium shots of reunion
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Immediate shift from magical color palette to sepia/natural tones
Visual disappearance of Silver Shoes during transition
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH023_SC004

## Production Intent
Execute the magical transition from a high-fantasy setting to a grounded prairie reality. The sequence must manage a sudden shift in color science and lighting temperature, moving from vibrant/magical to sepia/natural tones, while visually accounting for the loss of the Silver Shoes during the spatial jump.

## Required Cast
- dorothy (weary traveler, white clothing)
- uncle_henry
- toto

## Required Environments
- The Desert (transitional)
- kansas_prairie_farmstead

## Continuity Constraints
- Immediate shift from magical color palette to sepia/natural tones.
- Visual disappearance of Silver Shoes during transition.

## Beat List
- BT001: The Return Command (Heel clicks)
- BT002: The Spatial Jump (Transition through space)
- BT003: The Arrival and Reunion (Kansas farmhouse)
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
